attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] VM CPU readiness below 5% 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks the percentage of time VMs are ready but cannot get scheduled on physical CPU via OTel vcenterreceiver metrics. It ensures that 99.5% of 1-minute time intervals show average CPU readiness below 5% over a rolling 30-day period. High CPU readiness indicates host over-commitment or insufficient physical cores; remediation includes reducing vCPU allocations, decreasing VM density, or adding hosts.
